name: Creamy Sweet Potato Soup (Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Frozen peas (thawed under hot water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water, thyme, and diced onions to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add yams, celery, russet potatoes, and carrots; cook until potatoes begin to break apart and form a broth, about 30 minutes.
3. Add chopped carrots and remaining ingredients (basil, tarragon) to the pot; continue cooking for another 10-15 minutes until carrot pieces are tender.
4. Add peas and parsley; simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and blend sour cream and milk together in a blender container.
6. Stir the blended mixture into the soup along with salt and chives, then gently heat until hot but not boiling.
7. Adjust seasonings to taste.
